text.NRSV: Adam, Seth, Enosh;
text.Rotherham: Adam, Seth, Enosh:
text.KJV: 1:1 Adam, Sheth, Enosh,
text.NABRE: 1:1 I. Genealogical Tables Chapter 1 From Adam to Abraham. Adam, Seth, Enosh,

text.NRSV: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;
text.Rotherham: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared:
text.KJV: 1:2 Kenan, Mahalaleel, Iered,
text.NABRE: 1:2 Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared,

text.NRSV: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech;
text.Rotherham: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech:
text.KJV: 1:3 Henoch, Methushelah, Lamech,
text.NABRE: 1:3 Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech,

text.NRSV: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text.Rotherham: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text.KJV: 1:4 Noah, Shem, Ham, & Iapheth.
text.NABRE: 1:4 Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

text.NRSV: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Japheth, Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech and Tiras.
text.KJV: 1:5 ¶ The sonnes of Iapheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Iauan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
text.NABRE: 1:5 The sons of Japheth were Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.

text.NRSV: The sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, Diphath, and Togarmah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Gomer, Ashkenaz, and Diphath, and Togarmah.
text.KJV: 1:6 And the sonnes of Gomer: Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.
text.NABRE: 1:6 The sons of Gomer were Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Javan: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Javan, Elishah, and Tarshish,—Kittim, and Rodanim.
text.KJV: 1:7 And the sonnes of Iauan: Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
text.NABRE: 1:7 The sons of Javan were Elishah, Tarshish, the Kittim, and the Rodanim.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ham: Cush, Egypt, Put, and Canaan.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Ham, Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
text.KJV: 1:8 ¶ The sonnes of Ham: Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
text.NABRE: 1:8 The sons of Ham were Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Cush: Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raamah, and Sabteca. The sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Cush, Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raama, and Sabteca. And, the sons of Raamah, Sheba, and Dedan.
text.KJV: 1:9 And the sonnes of Cush: Siba, and Hauilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sonnes of Raamah: Sheba, and Dedan.
text.NABRE: 1:9 The sons of Cush were Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raama, and Sabteca. The sons of Raama were Sheba and Dedan.

text.NRSV: Cush became the father of Nimrod; he was the first to be a mighty one on the earth.
text.Rotherham: And, Cush, begat Nimrod,—he, began to be a mighty one in the earth.
text.KJV: 1:10 And Cush begate Nimrod: hee began to be mightie vpon the earth.
text.NABRE: 1:10 Cush became the father of Nimrod, who was the first to be a warrior on the earth.

text.NRSV: Egypt became the father of Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,
text.Rotherham: And, Mizraim, begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
text.KJV: 1:11 And Mizraim begate Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
text.NABRE: 1:11 Mizraim became the father of the Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,

text.NRSV: Pathrusim, Casluhim (from whom the Philistines come), and Caphtorim.
text.Rotherham: and Pathrusim, and Casluhim—whence went forth the Philistines, and Caphtorim.
text.KJV: 1:12 And Pathrusim, and Casluhim (of whome came the Philistines) and Caphthorim.
text.NABRE: 1:12 Pathrusim, Casluhim, and Caphtorim, from whom the Philistines sprang.

text.NRSV: Canaan became the father of Sidon his firstborn, and Heth,
text.Rotherham: And, Canaan, begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth;
text.KJV: 1:13 And Canaan begate Zidon his first borne, and Heth.
text.NABRE: 1:13 Canaan became the father of Sidon, his firstborn, and Heth,

text.NRSV: and the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,
text.Rotherham: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite;
text.KJV: 1:14 The Iebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,
text.NABRE: 1:14 and the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,

text.NRSV: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,
text.Rotherham: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite;
text.KJV: 1:15 And the Hiuite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,
text.NABRE: 1:15 the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,

text.NRSV: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites.
text.Rotherham: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
text.KJV: 1:16 And the Aruadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
text.NABRE: 1:16 the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shem: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether, and Meshech.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Shem, Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad, and Lud, and Aram,—and Uz, and Hul, and Gethur, and Meshech.
text.KJV: 1:17 ¶ The sonnes of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, & Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.
text.NABRE: 1:17 The sons of Shem were Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram. The sons of Aram were Uz, Hul, Gether, and Mash.

text.NRSV: Arpachshad became the father of Shelah; and Shelah became the father of Eber.
text.Rotherham: And, Arpachshad, begat Shelah,—and, Shelah, begat Eber.
text.KJV: 1:18 And Arphaxad begate Shelah, and Shelah begate Eber.
text.NABRE: 1:18 Arpachshad became the father of Shelah, and Shelah became the father of Eber.

text.NRSV: To Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg (for in his days the earth was divided), and the name of his brother Joktan.
text.Rotherham: And, unto Eber, were born two sons,—the name of the one, was Peleg, for, in his days, was the earth divided, and, the name of his brother, was Joktan.
text.KJV: 1:19 And vnto Eber were borne two sonnes: the name of the one was Peleg, (because in his dayes the earth was diuided) and his brothers name was Ioktan.
text.NABRE: 1:19 Two sons were born to Eber; the first was named Peleg (for in his time the world was divided), and his brother was named Joktan.

text.NRSV: Joktan became the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
text.Rotherham: And, Joktan, begat Almodad, and Sheleph,—and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah;
text.KJV: 1:20 And Ioktan begate Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazermaueth, and Ierah,
text.NABRE: 1:20 Joktan became the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,

text.NRSV: Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,
text.Rotherham: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah;
text.KJV: 1:21 Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,
text.NABRE: 1:21 Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,

text.NRSV: Ebal, Abimael, Sheba,
text.Rotherham: and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba;
text.KJV: 1:22 And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
text.NABRE: 1:22 Ebal, Abimael, Sheba,

text.NRSV: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.
text.Rotherham: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these, were the sons of Joktan.
text.KJV: 1:23 And Ophir, and Hauilah, and Iobab: all these were the sonnes of Ioktan.
text.NABRE: 1:23 Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.

text.NRSV: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;
text.Rotherham: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;
text.KJV: 1:24 ¶ Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,
text.NABRE: 1:24 Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah,

text.NRSV: Eber, Peleg, Reu;
text.Rotherham: Eber, Peleg, Reu;
text.KJV: 1:25 Eber, Peleg, Rehu,
text.NABRE: 1:25 Eber, Peleg, Reu,

text.NRSV: Serug, Nahor, Terah;
text.Rotherham: Serug, Nahor, Terah;
text.KJV: 1:26 Serug, Nahor, Terah,
text.NABRE: 1:26 Serug, Nahor, Terah,

text.NRSV: Abram, that is, Abraham.
text.Rotherham: Abram—the same, is Abraham.
text.KJV: 1:27 Abram, the same is Abraham.
text.NABRE: 1:27 Abram, that is, Abraham.

text.NRSV: The sons of Abraham: Isaac and Ishmael.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Abraham, Isaac and Ishmael.
text.KJV: 1:28 The sonnes of Abraham: Isaac, and Ishmael.
text.NABRE: 1:28 From Abraham to Jacob. The sons of Abraham were Isaac and Ishmael.

text.NRSV: These are their genealogies: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; and Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
text.Rotherham: These, are their generations,—the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth, then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam;
text.KJV: 1:29 ¶ These are their generations: The first-borne of Ishmael, Nebaioth, then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
text.NABRE: 1:29 These were their generations: Nebaioth, the firstborn of Ishmael, then Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,

text.NRSV: Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,
text.Rotherham: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema;
text.KJV: 1:30 Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,
text.NABRE: 1:30 Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,

text.NRSV: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.
text.Rotherham: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These, are the sons of Ishmael.
text.KJV: 1:31 Ietur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sonnes of Ishmael.
text.NABRE: 1:31 Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These were the sons of Ishmael.

text.NRSV: The sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bore Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah. The sons of Jokshan: Sheba and Dedan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Keturah, the concubine of Abraham, she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah,—and, the sons of Jokshan, Sheba, and Dedan;
text.KJV: 1:32 ¶ Now the sonnes of Keturah, Abrahams Concubine: she bare Zimran, and Iokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sonnes of Iokshan, Sheba, and Dedan.
text.NABRE: 1:32 The sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bore Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah. The sons of Jokshan were Sheba and Dedan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Midian: Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the descendants of Keturah.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Midian, Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these, were the sons of Keturah.
text.KJV: 1:33 And the sonnes of Midian: Ephah, and Ephar, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these are the sonnes of Keturah.
text.NABRE: 1:33 The sons of Midian were Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.

text.NRSV: Abraham became the father of Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau and Israel.
text.Rotherham: So then Abraham begat Isaac,—the sons of Isaac, were Esau and Israel.
text.KJV: 1:34 And Abraham begate Isaac. The sonnes of Isaac: Esau, and Israel.
text.NABRE: 1:34 Abraham begot Isaac. The sons of Isaac were Esau and Israel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Esau, Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jalam, and Korah.
text.KJV: 1:35 ¶ The sonnes of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, and Ieush, and Iaalam, and Korah.
text.NABRE: 1:35 The descendants of Esau were Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, and Amalek.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Eliphaz, Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
text.KJV: 1:36 The sonnes of Eliphaz: Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
text.NABRE: 1:36 The descendants of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, and Amalek.

text.NRSV: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Reuel, Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.KJV: 1:37 The sonnes of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.NABRE: 1:37 The descendants of Reuel were Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Seir: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Seir, Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah,—and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
text.KJV: 1:38 And the sonnes of Seir: Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
text.NABRE: 1:38 The sons of Seir were Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Lotan: Hori and Homam; and Lotan’s sister was Timna.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Lotan, Hori, and Homam,—and, Lotan’s sister, was Timna.
text.KJV: 1:39 And the sonnes of Lotan: Hori, and Homam: and Timna was Lotans sister.
text.NABRE: 1:39 The sons of Lotan were Hori and Homam; Timna was the sister of Lotan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shobal: Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Shobal, Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi and Onam. And, the sons of Zibeon, Aiah and Anah.
text.KJV: 1:40 The sonnes of Shobal: Atian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sonnes of Zibeon: Aiah, and Anah.
text.NABRE: 1:40 The sons of Shobal were Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon were Aiah and Anah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Anah: Dishon. The sons of Dishon: Hamran, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Anah, Dishon,—and, the sons of Dishon, Hamran, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.
text.KJV: 1:41 The sonnes of Anah: Dishon. And the sonnes of Dishon: Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.
text.NABRE: 1:41 The sons of Anah: Dishon. The sons of Dishon were Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, Zaavan, and Jaakan. The sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Ezer, Bilhan, and Zaavan, Jaakan. The sons of Dishan, Uz and Aran.
text.KJV: 1:42 The sonnes of Ezer: Bilham, and Zauan, and Iakan. The sonnes of Dishon: Uz, and Aran.
text.NABRE: 1:42 The sons of Ezer were Bilhan, Zaavan, and Jaakan. The sons of Dishan were Uz and Aran.

text.NRSV: These are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the Israelites: Bela son of Beor, the name of whose city was Dinhabah.
text.Rotherham: Now, these, are the kings, who reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned a king of the sons of Israel,—Bela the son of Beor, and, the name of his city, was Dinhabah.
text.KJV: 1:43 ¶ Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before any king reigned ouer the children of Israel. Bela the sonne of Beor; and the name of his citie, was Dinhabah.
text.NABRE: 1:43 The kings who reigned in the land of Edom before the Israelites had kings were the following: Bela, son of Beor, the name of whose city was Dinhabah.

text.NRSV: When Bela died, Jobab son of Zerah of Bozrah succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Bela died,—and there reigned in his stead, Jobab son of Zerah, of Bozrah.
text.KJV: 1:44 And when Bela was dead, Iobab the sonne of Zerah of Bosrah, reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: 1:44 When Bela died, Jobab, son of Zerah, from Bozrah, succeeded him as king.

text.NRSV: When Jobab died, Husham of the land of the Temanites succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Jobab died,—and there reigned in his stead, Husham, of the land of the Temanites.
text.KJV: 1:45 And when Iobab was dead, Husham of the land of the Temanits, reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: 1:45 When Jobab died, Husham, from the land of the Temanites, succeeded him as king.

text.NRSV: When Husham died, Hadad son of Bedad, who defeated Midian in the country of Moab, succeeded him; the name of his city was Avith.
text.Rotherham: And Husham died,—and there reigned in his stead, Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, and, the name of his city, was Avith.
text.KJV: 1:46 And when Husham was dead, Hadad, the sonne of Bedad (which smote Midian in the field of Moab) reigned in his stead: and the name of his citie was Auith.
text.NABRE: 1:46 Husham died and Hadad, son of Bedad, succeeded him as king. He overthrew the Midianites on the Moabite plateau, and the name of his city was Avith.

text.NRSV: When Hadad died, Samlah of Masrekah succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Hadad died,—and there reigned in his stead, Samlah of Masrekah.
text.KJV: 1:47 And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah, reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: 1:47 Hadad died and Samlah of Masrekah succeeded him as king.

text.NRSV: When Samlah died, Shaul of Rehoboth on the Euphrates succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Samlah died,—and there reigned in his stead, Shaul, of Rehoboth by the River.
text.KJV: 1:48 And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the riuer, reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: 1:48 Samlah died and Shaul from Rehoboth on the Euphrates succeeded him as king.

text.NRSV: When Shaul died, Baal-hanan son of Achbor succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Shaul died,—and there reigned in his stead, Baal-hanan, the son of Achbor.
text.KJV: 1:49 And when Shaul was dead, Baal-hanan the sonne of Achbor, reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: 1:49 When Shaul died, Baalhanan, son of Achbor, succeeded him as king.

text.NRSV: When Baal-hanan died, Hadad succeeded him; the name of his city was Pai, and his wife’s name Mehetabel daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.
text.Rotherham: And Baal-hanan died,—and there reigned in his stead, Hadad, and, the name of his city, was Pai,—and, the name of his wife, was Mehetabel, daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.
text.KJV: 1:50 And when Baal-hanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his citie was Pai: and his wiues name was Mehetabel the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
text.NABRE: 1:50 Baalhanan died and Hadad succeeded him as king. The name of his city was Pai, and his wife’s name was Mehetabel. She was the daughter of Matred, who was the daughter of Mezahab.

text.NRSV: And Hadad died. The clans of Edom were: clans Timna, Alvah, Jetheth,
text.Rotherham: And Hadad died. And there were chiefs of Edom: chief Timna, chief Aliah, chief Jetheth;
text.KJV: 1:51 ¶ Hadad dyed also. And the Dukes of Edom were: Duke Timnah, Duke Aliah, Duke Ietheth,
text.NABRE: 1:51 After Hadad died, there were chiefs in Edom: the chiefs of Timna, Aliah, Jetheth,

text.NRSV: Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,
text.Rotherham: chief Oholibamah, chief Elah, chief Pinon;
text.KJV: 1:52 Duke Aholibamah, Duke Elah, Duke Pinon,
text.NABRE: 1:52 Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,

text.NRSV: Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,
text.Rotherham: chief Kenaz, chief Teman, chief Mibzar;
text.KJV: 1:53 Duke Kenaz, Duke Teman, Duke Mibzar,
text.NABRE: 1:53 Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,

text.NRSV: Magdiel, and Iram; these are the clans of Edom.
text.Rotherham: chief Magdiel, chief Iram. These, were the chiefs of Edom.
text.KJV: 1:54 Duke Magdiel, Duke Iram. These are the Dukes of Edom.
text.NABRE: 1:54 Magdiel, and Iram were the chiefs of Edom.

text.NRSV: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun,
text.Rotherham: These, are the sons of Israel,—Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun;
text.KJV: 2:1 These are the sonnes of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Leui, and Iudah, Issachar, and Zebulun,
text.NABRE: 2:1 Chapter 2 These were the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun,

text.NRSV: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
text.Rotherham: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher,
text.KJV: 2:2 Dan, Ioseph, and Beniamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
text.NABRE: 2:2 Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

text.NRSV: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan, and Shelah; these three Bath-shua the Canaanite bore to him. Now Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, and he put him to death.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Judah, Er, and Onan, and Shelah, the three born to him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess,—but Er the firstborn of Judah became wicked in the eyes of Yahweh, and he slew him.
text.KJV: 2:3 ¶ The sonnes of Iudah: Er, and Onan, and Shelah. Which three were borne vnto him, of the daughter of Shua the Canaanites. And Er the first-borne of Iudah, was euill in the sight of the Lord, and he slue him.
text.NABRE: 2:3 Judah. The sons of Judah were: Er, Onan, and Shelah; these three Bathshua, a Canaanite woman, bore to him. But Judah’s firstborn, Er, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, so he took his life.

text.NRSV: His daughter-in-law Tamar also bore him Perez and Zerah. Judah had five sons in all.
text.Rotherham: And, Tamar his daughter-in-law, bare him, Perez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah, were five.
text.KJV: 2:4 And Tamar his daughter-in law bare him Pharez, and Zerah. All the sonnes of Iudah were fiue.
text.NABRE: 2:4 Judah’s daughter-in-law Tamar bore him Perez and Zerah, so that he had five sons in all.

text.NRSV: The sons of Perez: Hezron and Hamul.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Perez, Hezron and Hamul.
text.KJV: 2:5 The sonnes of Pharez: Hezron, and Hamul.
text.NABRE: 2:5 The sons of Perez were Hezron and Hamul.

text.NRSV: The sons of Zerah: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Dara, five in all.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Zerah, Zimri and Ethan, and Heman and Calcol and Dara, all of them, five.
text.KJV: 2:6 And the sonnes of Zerah: Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara. Fiue of them in all.
text.NABRE: 2:6 The sons of Zerah were Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Darda—five in all.

text.NRSV: The sons of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the matter of the devoted thing;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Carmi, Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in a thing devoted.
text.KJV: 2:7 And the sonnes of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.
text.NABRE: 2:7 The sons of Zimri: Carmi. The sons of Carmi: Achar, who brought trouble upon Israel by violating the ban.

text.NRSV: and Ethan’s son was Azariah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Ethan, Azariah.
text.KJV: 2:8 And the sonnes of Ethan: Azariah.
text.NABRE: 2:8 The sons of Ethan: Azariah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Hezron, who were born to him: Jerahmeel, Ram, and Chelubai.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Hezron, who were born to him, Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Calubai.
text.KJV: 2:9 The sonnes also of Hezron, that were borne vnto him: Ierahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
text.NABRE: 2:9 The sons born to Hezron were Jerahmeel, Ram, and Chelubai.

text.NRSV: Ram became the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab became the father of Nahshon, prince of the sons of Judah.
text.Rotherham: And, Ram, begat Amminadab,—and, Amminadab, begat Nahshon, leader of the sons of Judah.
text.KJV: 2:10 And Ram begate Aminadab, and Aminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Iudah.
text.NABRE: 2:10 Ram became the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab became the father of Nahshon, a prince of the Judahites.

text.NRSV: Nahshon became the father of Salma, Salma became the father of Boaz,
text.Rotherham: And, Nahshon, begat Salma, and, Salma, begat Boaz;
text.KJV: 2:11 And Nahshon begate Salma, and Salma begate Boaz.
text.NABRE: 2:11 Nahshon became the father of Salmah. Salmah became the father of Boaz.

text.NRSV: Boaz became the father of Obed, Obed became the father of Jesse.
text.Rotherham: and, Boaz, begat Obed, and, Obed, begat Jesse;
text.KJV: 2:12 And Boaz begate Obed, and Obed begate Iesse.
text.NABRE: 2:12 Boaz became the father of Obed. Obed became the father of Jesse.

text.NRSV: Jesse became the father of Eliab his firstborn, Abinadab the second, Shimea the third,
text.Rotherham: and, Jesse, begat—his firstborn, Eliab,—and Abinadab, the second, and Shimea, the third;
text.KJV: 2:13 ¶ And Iesse begate his first-borne Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,
text.NABRE: 2:13 Jesse became the father of Eliab, his firstborn, of Abinadab, the second son, Shimea, the third,

text.NRSV: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
text.Rotherham: Nethanel, the fourth, Raddai, the fifth;
text.KJV: 2:14 Nathanael the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
text.NABRE: 2:14 Nethanel, the fourth, Raddai, the fifth,

text.NRSV: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh;
text.Rotherham: Ozem, the sixth, David, the seventh.
text.KJV: 2:15 Ozem the sixth, Dauid the seuenth:
text.NABRE: 2:15 Ozem, the sixth, and David, the seventh.

text.NRSV: and their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. The sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel, three.
text.Rotherham: And, their sisters, were Zeruiah and Abigail,—and, the sons of Zeruiah, Abishai and Joab and Asahel, three,
text.KJV: 2:16 Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sonnes of Zeruiah: Abishai, and Ioab, and Asahel, three.
text.NABRE: 2:16 Their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. Zeruiah had three sons: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel.

text.NRSV: Abigail bore Amasa, and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.
text.Rotherham: And, Abigail, bare Amasa,—and, the father of Amasa, was Jether the Ishmaelite.
text.KJV: 2:17 And Abigail bare Amasa. And the father of Amasa, was Iether the Ishmeelite.
text.NABRE: 2:17 Abigail bore Amasa, whose father was Jether the Ishmaelite.

text.NRSV: Caleb son of Hezron had children by his wife Azubah, and by Jerioth; these were her sons: Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.
text.Rotherham: And, Caleb son of Hezron, begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth,—and, these, were her sons, Jesher and Shobab and Ardon.
text.KJV: 2:18 ¶ And Caleb the sonne of Hezron, begate children of Azubah his wife, and of Ierioth: her sonnes are these: Iesher, Shobab, and Ardon.
text.NABRE: 2:18 By his wife Azubah, Caleb, son of Hezron, became the father of a daughter, Jerioth. Her sons were Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.

text.NRSV: When Azubah died, Caleb married Ephrath, who bore him Hur.
text.Rotherham: And Azubah died,—and Caleb took unto him Ephrath, and she bare to him Hur.
text.KJV: 2:19 And when Azubah was dead, Caleb tooke vnto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.
text.NABRE: 2:19 When Azubah died, Caleb married Ephrath, who bore him Hur.

text.NRSV: Hur became the father of Uri, and Uri became the father of Bezalel.
text.Rotherham: And, Hur, begat Uri, and, Uri, begat Bezalel.
text.KJV: 2:20 And Hur begate Uri, and Uri begate Bezaleel.
text.NABRE: 2:20 Hur became the father of Uri, and Uri became the father of Bezalel.

text.NRSV: Afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old; and she bore him Segub.
text.Rotherham: And, afterward, Hezron went in unto the daughter of Machir, father of Gilead, and he took her when he was sixty years old,—and she bare him Segub.
text.KJV: 2:21 ¶ And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir, the father of Gilead, whom hee married when he was threescore yeeres old, and she bare him Segub.
text.NABRE: 2:21 Then Hezron had relations with the daughter of Machir, the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old. She bore him Segub.

text.NRSV: And Segub became the father of Jair, who had twenty-three towns in the land of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: And, Segub, begat Jair,—who came to have twenty-three cities, in the land of Gilead;
text.KJV: 2:22 And Segub begate Iair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
text.NABRE: 2:22 Segub became the father of Jair, who possessed twenty-three cities in the land of Gilead.

text.NRSV: But Geshur and Aram took from them Havvoth-jair, Kenath and its villages, sixty towns. All these were descendants of Machir, father of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: but Geshur and Aram took the towns of Jair from them, with Kenath and the villages thereof, sixty cities. All these, were the sons of Machir, father of Gilead.
text.KJV: 2:23 And he tooke Geshur, and Aram, with the townes of Iair, from them, with Kenath, and the townes thereof, euen threescore cities. All these belonged to the sonnes of Machir, the father of Gilead.
text.NABRE: 2:23 Geshur and Aram took from them the villages of Jair, that is, Kenath and its towns, sixty cities in all, which had belonged to the sons of Machir, the father of Gilead.

text.NRSV: After the death of Hezron, in Caleb-ephrathah, Abijah wife of Hezron bore him Ashhur, father of Tekoa.
text.Rotherham: And, after the death of Hezron, Caleb entered Ephrathah,—and, the wife of Hezron, was Abiah, who bare him Ashur, father of Tekoa.
text.KJV: 2:24 And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb Ephratah, then Abiah Hezrons wife, bare him Ashur, the father of Tekoa.
text.NABRE: 2:24 After the death of Hezron, Caleb had relations with Ephrathah, the widow of his father Hezron, and she bore him Ashhur, the father of Tekoa.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jerahmeel, the firstborn of Hezron: Ram his firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Jerahmeel firstborn of Hezron were, the firstborn, Ram,—and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem [of] Ahijah.
text.KJV: 2:25 ¶ And the sonnes of Ierahmeel the first-borne of Hezron, were Ram the first-borne, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozen, and Ahiiah.
text.NABRE: 2:25 The sons of Jerahmeel, the firstborn of Hezron, were Ram, the firstborn, then Bunah, Oren, and Ozem, his brothers.

text.NRSV: Jerahmeel also had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
text.Rotherham: And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name, was Atarah,—the same, was the mother of Onam.
text.KJV: 2:26 Ierahmeel had also an other wife, whose name was Atarah, she was the mother of Onam.
text.NABRE: 2:26 Jerahmeel also had another wife, named Atarah, who was the mother of Onam.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerahmeel: Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerameel, were,—Maaz and Jamin, and Eker.
text.KJV: 2:27 And the sonnes of Ram the first-borne of Ierahmeel, were Maaz, and Iamin, and Ekar.
text.NABRE: 2:27 The sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerahmeel, were Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.

text.NRSV: The sons of Onam: Shammai and Jada. The sons of Shammai: Nadab and Abishur.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai and Jada,—and, the sons of Shammai, Nadab and Abishur.
text.KJV: 2:28 And the sonnes of Onam were, Shammai, and Iada. And the sonnes of Shammai: Nadab, and Abishur.
text.NABRE: 2:28 The sons of Onam were Shammai and Jada. The sons of Shammai were Nadab and Abishur.

text.NRSV: The name of Abishur’s wife was Abihail, and she bore him Ahban and Molid.
text.Rotherham: And, the name of the wife of Abishur, was Abihail,—and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.
text.KJV: 2:29 And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and shee bare him Ahban, and Molid.
text.NABRE: 2:29 Abishur’s wife, who was named Abihail, bore him Ahban and Molid.

text.NRSV: The sons of Nadab: Seled and Appaim; and Seled died childless.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Nadab, Seled and Appaim,—but Seled died without sons.
text.KJV: 2:30 And the sonnes of Nadab: Seled, and Appaim. But Seled died without children.
text.NABRE: 2:30 The sons of Nadab were Seled and Appaim. Seled died childless.

text.NRSV: The son of Appaim: Ishi. The son of Ishi: Sheshan. The son of Sheshan: Ahlai.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Appaim, Ishi, and, the sons of Ishi, Sheshan, and, the sons of Sheshan, Ahlai.
text.KJV: 2:31 And the sonnes of Appaim, Ishi: and the sonnes of Ishi, Sheshan: and the children of Sheshan, Ahlai.
text.NABRE: 2:31 The sons of Appaim: Ishi. The sons of Ishi: Sheshan. The sons of Sheshan: Ahlai.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jada, Shammai’s brother: Jether and Jonathan; and Jether died childless.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jada, brother of Shammai, Jether, and Jonathan,—but Jether died without sons.
text.KJV: 2:32 And the sonnes of Iada the brother of Shammai, Iether, and Ionathan: and Iether died without children.
text.NABRE: 2:32 The sons of Jada, the brother of Shammai, were Jether and Jonathan. Jether died childless.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jonathan: Peleth and Zaza. These were the descendants of Jerahmeel.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Jonathan, Peleth and Zaza. These, were the sons of Jerahmeel.
text.KJV: 2:33 And the sonnes of Ionathan, Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sonnes of Ierahmeel.
text.NABRE: 2:33 The sons of Jonathan were Peleth and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

text.NRSV: Now Sheshan had no sons, only daughters; but Sheshan had an Egyptian slave, whose name was Jarha.
text.Rotherham: Now Sheshan had, no sons, but, daughters,—and, Sheshan, had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha;
text.KJV: 2:34 ¶ Now Sheshan had no sonnes, but daughters: and Sheshan had a seruant, an Egyptian, whose name was Iarha.
text.NABRE: 2:34 Sheshan had no sons, only daughters; he had an Egyptian slave named Jarha.

text.NRSV: So Sheshan gave his daughter in marriage to his slave Jarha; and she bore him Attai.
text.Rotherham: so Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant, to wife,—and she bare him Attai.
text.KJV: 2:35 And Sheshan gaue his daughter to Iarha his seruant to wife, and she bare him Attai.
text.NABRE: 2:35 Sheshan gave his daughter in marriage to his slave Jarha, and she bore him Attai.

text.NRSV: Attai became the father of Nathan, and Nathan became the father of Zabad.
text.Rotherham: And, Attai, begat Nathan, and, Nathan, begat Zabad;
text.KJV: 2:36 And Attai begate Nathan, and Nathan begate Zabad,
text.NABRE: 2:36 Attai became the father of Nathan. Nathan became the father of Zabad.

text.NRSV: Zabad became the father of Ephlal, and Ephlal became the father of Obed.
text.Rotherham: and, Zabad, begat Ephlal, and, Ephlal, begat Obed;
text.KJV: 2:37 And Zabad begate Ephlal, and Ephlal begate Obed,
text.NABRE: 2:37 Zabad became the father of Ephlal. Ephlal became the father of Obed.

text.NRSV: Obed became the father of Jehu, and Jehu became the father of Azariah.
text.Rotherham: and, Obed, begat Jehu, and, Jehu, begat Azariah;
text.KJV: 2:38 And Obed begate Iehu, and Iehu begate Azariah,
text.NABRE: 2:38 Obed became the father of Jehu. Jehu became the father of Azariah.

text.NRSV: Azariah became the father of Helez, and Helez became the father of Eleasah.
text.Rotherham: and, Azariah, begat Helez, and, Helez, begat Eleasah;
text.KJV: 2:39 And Azariah begate Helez, and Helez begate Eleasah,
text.NABRE: 2:39 Azariah became the father of Helez. Helez became the father of Eleasah.

text.NRSV: Eleasah became the father of Sismai, and Sismai became the father of Shallum.
text.Rotherham: and, Eleasah, begat Sismai, and, Sismai, begat Shallum;
text.KJV: 2:40 And Eleasah begate Sisamai, and Sisamai begate Shallum,
text.NABRE: 2:40 Eleasah became the father of Sismai. Sismai became the father of Shallum.

text.NRSV: Shallum became the father of Jekamiah, and Jekamiah became the father of Elishama.
text.Rotherham: and, Shallum, begat Jekamiah, and, Jekamiah, begat Elishama.
text.KJV: 2:41 And Shallum begate Iekamiah, and Iekamiah begate Elishama.
text.NABRE: 2:41 Shallum became the father of Jekamiah. Jekamiah became the father of Elishama.

text.NRSV: The sons of Caleb brother of Jerahmeel: Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph. The sons of Mareshah father of Hebron.
text.Rotherham: Now, the sons of Caleb, brother of Jerahmeel, were, Mesha his firstborn, the same, was the father of Ziph,—and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
text.KJV: 2:42 ¶ Now the sonnes of Caleb the brother of Ierahmeel were, Mesha his first-borne, which was the father of Ziph: and the sonnes of Maresha the father of Hebron.
text.NABRE: 2:42 The sons of Caleb, the brother of Jerahmeel: Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph. Then the sons of Mareshah, who was the father of Hebron.

text.NRSV: The sons of Hebron: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, and Shema.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Hebron, Korah and Tappuah, and Rekem and Shema.
text.KJV: 2:43 And the sonnes of Hebron: Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.
text.NABRE: 2:43 The sons of Hebron were Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, and Shema.

text.NRSV: Shema became the father of Raham, father of Jorkeam; and Rekem became the father of Shammai.
text.Rotherham: And, Shema, begat Raham, the father of Jorkeam,—and, Rekem, begat Shammai.
text.KJV: 2:44 And Shema begat Raham, the father of Iorkoam: and Rekem begate Shammai.
text.NABRE: 2:44 Shema became the father of Raham, who was the father of Jorkeam. Rekem became the father of Shammai.

text.NRSV: The son of Shammai: Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
text.Rotherham: And, the son of Shammai, was Maon,—and, Maon, was the father of Beth-zur.
text.KJV: 2:45 And the sonne of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
text.NABRE: 2:45 The son of Shammai: Maon, who was the father of Beth-zur.

text.NRSV: Ephah also, Caleb’s concubine, bore Haran, Moza, and Gazez; and Haran became the father of Gazez.
text.Rotherham: And, Ephah, the concubine of Caleb, bare Haran and Moza, and Gazez,—and, Haran, begat Gazez.
text.KJV: 2:46 And Ephah Calebs concubine bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begate Gazez.
text.NABRE: 2:46 Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Haran, Moza, and Gazez. Haran became the father of Gazez.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jahdai: Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jahdai, Regem and Jotham and Geshan and Pelet, and Ephah and Shaaph.
text.KJV: 2:47 And the sonnes of Iahdai: Regem, and Iotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
text.NABRE: 2:47 The sons of Jahdai were Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.

text.NRSV: Maacah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.
text.Rotherham: A concubine of Caleb, Maacah, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah;
text.KJV: 2:48 Maacha Calebs concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.
text.NABRE: 2:48 Maacah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.

text.NRSV: She also bore Shaaph father of Madmannah, Sheva father of Machbenah and father of Gibea; and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
text.Rotherham: she also bare Shaaph, father of Madmannah, Sheva, father of Machbena, and father of Gibea,—and, the daughter of Caleb, was Achsah.
text.KJV: 2:49 Shee bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheua the father of Machbenah, & the father of Gibea: And the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
text.NABRE: 2:49 She also bore Shaaph, the father of Madmannah, Sheva, the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea. Achsah was Caleb’s daughter.

text.NRSV: These were the descendants of Caleb. The sons of Hur the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal father of Kiriath-jearim,
text.Rotherham: These, were the sons of Caleb, sons of Hur, firstborn of Ephrathah,—Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim;
text.KJV: 2:50 ¶ These were the sonnes of Caleb, the sonne of Hur, the first borne of Ephratah: Shobal the father of Kiriath-iearim,
text.NABRE: 2:50 These were sons of Caleb, sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim,

text.NRSV: Salma father of Bethlehem, and Hareph father of Beth-gader.
text.Rotherham: Salma, the father of Bethlehem, Hareph, the father of Beth-gader.
text.KJV: 2:51 Salma the father of Bethlehem: Hareph the father of Beth-gader.
text.NABRE: 2:51 Salma, the father of Bethlehem, and Hareph, the father of Bethgader.

text.NRSV: Shobal father of Kiriath-jearim had other descendants: Haroeh, half of the Menuhoth.
text.Rotherham: And Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim had sons,—Haroeh, half of the Menuhoth.
text.KJV: 2:52 And Shobal the father of Kiriath-iearim, had sonnes, Haroe, and halfe of the Manahethites.
text.NABRE: 2:52 The sons of Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim, were Reaiah, half of the Manahathites,

text.NRSV: And the families of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, the Puthites, the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; from these came the Zorathites and the Eshtaolites.
text.Rotherham: And, the families of Kiriath-jearim, were the Ithrites, and the Puthites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites,—from these, came the Zorathites, and the Eshtaolites.
text.KJV: 2:53 And the families of Kiriath-iearim, the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites: of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.
text.NABRE: 2:53 and the clans of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, the Puthites, the Shumathites, and the Mishraites. From these the Zorahites and the Eshtaolites derived.

text.NRSV: The sons of Salma: Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab, and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Salma, were Bethlehem, and the Netophathites, Atrothbeth-joab,—and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites;
text.KJV: 2:54 The sonnes of Salmah: Bethlehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Ioab, and halfe of the Manahethites, the Zorites.
text.NABRE: 2:54 The sons of Salma were Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-Joab, half of the Manahathites, and the Zorites.

text.NRSV: The families also of the scribes that lived at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and the Sucathites. These are the Kenites who came from Hammath, father of the house of Rechab.
text.Rotherham: and the families of scribes who dwelt at Jabez, the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, the Sucathites. The same, are the Kenites who came in from Hammath, father of the house of Rechab.
text.KJV: 2:55 And the families of the Scribes, which dwelt at Iabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
text.NABRE: 2:55 The clans of the Sopherim dwelling in Jabez were the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and the Sucathites. They were the Kenites, who descended from Hammath, the ancestor of the Rechabites.

text.NRSV: These are the sons of David who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelite; the second Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelite;
text.Rotherham: Now, these, were the sons of David, who were born to him in Hebron,—the firstborn, Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelitess, the second, Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelitess;
text.KJV: 3:1 Now these were the sonnes of Dauid, which were borne vnto him in Hebron. The first borne Amnon, of Ahinoam the Iesreelitesse: the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitesse:
text.NABRE: 3:1 Chapter 3 These were the sons of David born to him in Hebron: the firstborn, Amnon, by Ahinoam of Jezreel; the second, Daniel, by Abigail of Carmel;

text.NRSV: the third Absalom son of Maacah, daughter of King Talmai of Geshur; the fourth Adonijah son of Haggith;
text.Rotherham: the third, Absalom, son of Maacah, daughter of Talmai, king of Geshur,—the fourth, Adonijah, son of Haggith;
text.KJV: 3:2 The third, Absalom the sonne of Maacha, the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adoniah the sonne of Haggith:
text.NABRE: 3:2 the third, Absalom, son of Maacah, who was the daughter of Talmai, king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah, son of Haggith;

text.NRSV: the fifth Shephatiah, by Abital; the sixth Ithream, by his wife Eglah;
text.Rotherham: the fifth, Shephatiah, by Abital,—the sixth, Ithream, by Eglah his wife:
text.KJV: 3:3 The fifth, Shephatia of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.
text.NABRE: 3:3 the fifth, Shephatiah, by Abital; the sixth, Ithream, by his wife Eglah.

text.NRSV: six were born to him in Hebron, where he reigned for seven years and six months. And he reigned thirty-three years in Jerusalem.
text.Rotherham: six born to him in Hebron, and he reigned there, seven years and six months. And, thirty and three years, reigned he, in Jerusalem.
text.KJV: 3:4 These sixe were borne vnto him in Hebron, and there hee reigned seuen yeeres, and sixe moneths: and in Ierusalem he reigned thirty and three yeres.
text.NABRE: 3:4 Six in all were born to him in Hebron, where he reigned seven years and six months. Then he reigned thirty-three years in Jerusalem.

text.NRSV: These were born to him in Jerusalem: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon, four by Bath-shua, daughter of Ammiel;
text.Rotherham: And, these, were born to him in Jerusalem, Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon—four, by Bathshua, daughter of Ammiel;
text.KJV: 3:5 And these were borne vnto him in Ierusalem. Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, foure, of Bathshua the daughter of Ammiel.
text.NABRE: 3:5 In Jerusalem the following were born to him: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon—four by Bathsheba, the daughter of Ammiel;

text.NRSV: then Ibhar, Elishama, Eliphelet,
text.Rotherham: and Ibhar, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
text.KJV: 3:6 Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
text.NABRE: 3:6 Ibhar, Elishua, Eliphelet,

text.NRSV: Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia,
text.Rotherham: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
text.KJV: 3:7 And Noga, and Nepheg, and Iaphia,
text.NABRE: 3:7 Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia,

text.NRSV: Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
text.Rotherham: and Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet—nine.
text.KJV: 3:8 And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
text.NABRE: 3:8 Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet—nine.

text.NRSV: All these were David’s sons, besides the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.
text.Rotherham: All, sons of David,—besides sons of concubines, and, Tamar, their sister.
text.KJV: 3:9 These were all the sonnes of Dauid: beside the sonnes of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.
text.NABRE: 3:9 All these were sons of David, in addition to other sons by concubines; and Tamar was their sister.

text.NRSV: The descendants of Solomon: Rehoboam, Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,
text.Rotherham: And, the son of Solomon, was Rehoboam,—Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son;
text.KJV: 3:10 ¶ And Solomons sonne was Rehoboam: Abia his sonne: Asa his son: Iehoshaphat his sonne:
text.NABRE: 3:10 The son of Solomon was Rehoboam, whose son was Abijah, whose son was Asa, whose son was Jehoshaphat,

text.NRSV: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
text.Rotherham: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son;
text.KJV: 3:11 Ioram his sonne: Ahaziah his sonne: Ioash his sonne:
text.NABRE: 3:11 whose son was Joram, whose son was Ahaziah, whose son was Joash,

text.NRSV: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,
text.Rotherham: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son;
text.KJV: 3:12 Amaziah his sonne: Azariah his sonne: Iotham his sonne:
text.NABRE: 3:12 whose son was Amaziah, whose son was Azariah, whose son was Jotham,

text.NRSV: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,
text.Rotherham: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son;
text.KJV: 3:13 Ahaz his sonne: Hezekiah his sonne: Manasseh his sonne:
text.NABRE: 3:13 whose son was Ahaz, whose son was Hezekiah, whose son was Manasseh,

text.NRSV: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
text.Rotherham: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
text.KJV: 3:14 Amon his sonne: Iosiah his sonne.
text.NABRE: 3:14 whose son was Amon, whose son was Josiah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Josiah: Johanan the firstborn, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Josiah, the firstborn, Johanan, the second, Jehoiakim,—the third, Zedekiah, the fourth, Shallum.
text.KJV: 3:15 And the sonnes of Iosiah were: the first borne Iohanan, the second Ioakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Sallum.
text.NABRE: 3:15 The sons of Josiah were: the firstborn Johanan; the second, Jehoiakim; the third, Zedekiah; the fourth, Shallum.

text.NRSV: The descendants of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jehoiakim,—Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
text.KJV: 3:16 And the sonnes of Ioakim: Ieconiah his sonne, Zedekiah his sonne.
text.NABRE: 3:16 The sons of Jehoiakim were: Jeconiah, his son; Zedekiah, his son.

text.NRSV: and the sons of Jeconiah, the captive: Shealtiel his son,
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jeconiah the captive, Shealtiel his son;
text.KJV: 3:17 ¶ And the sonnes of Ieconiah, Assir, Salathiel his sonne,
text.NABRE: 3:17 The sons of Jeconiah the captive were: Shealtiel,

text.NRSV: Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah;
text.Rotherham: and Malchiram, and Pedaiah, and Shenazzar,—Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
text.KJV: 3:18 Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Iecamiah, Hosama, and Nedabiah.
text.NABRE: 3:18 Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

text.NRSV: the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel and Shimei; and the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam and Hananiah, and Shelomith was their sister;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Pedaiah, Zerubbabel, and Shimei,—and, the sons of Zerubbabel, Meshullam, and Hananiah, and, Shelomith, was their sister;
text.KJV: 3:19 And the sonnes of Pedaiah were: Zerubbabel, and Shimei: And the sonne of Zerubbabel, Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister.
text.NABRE: 3:19 The sons of Pedaiah were Zerubbabel and Shimei. The sons of Zerubbabel were Meshullam and Hananiah; Shelomith was their sister.

text.NRSV: and Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, and Jushab-hesed, five.
text.Rotherham: and Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushab-hesed—five.
text.KJV: 3:20 And Hazubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, & Hasadiah, Iushabhesed, fiue.
text.NABRE: 3:20 The sons of Meshullam were Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, Jushabhesed—five.

text.NRSV: The sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah and Jeshaiah, his son Rephaiah, his son Arnan, his son Obadiah, his son Shecaniah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Hananiah, Pelatiah, and Jeshaiah,—the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shecaniah;
text.KJV: 3:21 And the sonnes of Hananiah, Pelatiah, and Iesaiah: the sonnes of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sonnes of Obadiah, the sonnes of Sechaniah.
text.NABRE: 3:21 The sons of Hananiah were Pelatiah, Jeshaiah, Rephaiah, Arnan, Obadiah, and Shecaniah.

text.NRSV: The son of Shecaniah: Shemaiah. And the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Shecaniah, Shemaiah,—and, the sons of Shemaiah, Hattush, and Igal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat—six;
text.KJV: 3:22 And the sonnes of Sechaniah, Semaiah: and the sonnes of Semaiah, Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, sixe.
text.NABRE: 3:22 The sons of Shecaniah were Shemaiah, Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, Shaphat—six.

text.NRSV: The sons of Neariah: Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.
text.Rotherham: and, the son of Neariah, Elioenai, and Hizkiah, and Azrikam—three;
text.KJV: 3:23 And the sonnes of Neariah: Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
text.NABRE: 3:23 The sons of Neariah were Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam—three.

text.NRSV: The sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani, seven.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Elioenai, Hodaviah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Delaiah, and Anani—seven.
text.KJV: 3:24 And the sonnes of Elioenai, were: Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Iohanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seuen.
text.NABRE: 3:24 The sons of Elioenai were Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani—seven.

text.NRSV: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Judah, Perez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
text.KJV: 4:1 The sonnes of Iudah: Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
text.NABRE: 4:1 Chapter 4 The sons of Judah were: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.

text.NRSV: Reaiah son of Shobal became the father of Jahath, and Jahath became the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These were the families of the Zorathites.
text.Rotherham: And, Reaiah son of Shobal, begat Jahath, and, Jahath, begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These, are the families of the Zorathites.
text.KJV: 4:2 And Reaiah, the son of Shobal, begate Iahath, and Iahath begate Ahumai, & Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
text.NABRE: 4:2 Reaiah, the son of Shobal, became the father of Jahath, and Jahath became the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These were the clans of the Zorathites.

text.NRSV: These were the sons of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazzelelponi,
text.Rotherham: And, these, were the sons of Etam, Jezreel and Ishma, and Idbash,—and, the name of their sister, was Hazzelelponi;
text.KJV: 4:3 And these were of the father of Etam: Iezreel & Ishma, & Idbash: and the name of their sister was Hazelelponi.
text.NABRE: 4:3 These were the sons of Hareph, the father of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash; their sister was named Hazzelelponi.

text.NRSV: and Penuel was the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.
text.Rotherham: and Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer, the father of Hushah. These, are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.
text.KJV: 4:4 And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sonnes of Hur, the first borne of Ephratah, the father of Bethlehem.
text.NABRE: 4:4 Penuel was the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.

text.NRSV: Ashhur father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah;
text.Rotherham: And, Ashhur the father of Tekoa, had two wives,—Helah, and Naarah.
text.KJV: 4:5 ¶ And Ashur the father of Tekoa, had two wiues: Helah, & Naarah.
text.NABRE: 4:5 Ashhur, the father of Tekoa, had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

text.NRSV: Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
text.Rotherham: And Naarah bare him Ahuzzam and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These, were the sons of Naarah.
text.KJV: 4:6 And Naarah bare him Ahusam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Ahashtari. These were the sonnes of Naarah.
text.NABRE: 4:6 Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, Hepher, the Temenites, and the Ahashtarites. These were the sons of Naarah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Helah: Zereth, Izhar, and Ethnan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Helah, were Zereth, Izhar, and Ethnan.
text.KJV: 4:7 And the sonnes of Helah were: Zereth, and Zoar, and Ethnan.
text.NABRE: 4:7 The sons of Helah were Zereth, Izhar, Ethnan, and Koz.

text.NRSV: Koz became the father of Anub, Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel son of Harum.
text.Rotherham: And, Koz, begat Anub, and Zobebah,—and the families of Aharhel, the son of Harum.
text.KJV: 4:8 And Coz begate Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel, the sonne of Harum.
text.NABRE: 4:8 Koz became the father of Anub and Zobebah, as well as of the clans of Aharhel, son of Harum.

text.NRSV: Jabez was honored more than his brothers; and his mother named him Jabez, saying, “Because I bore him in pain.”
text.Rotherham: Now it came to pass that Jabez was more honourable than his brethren,—but, his mother, had called his name Jabez, [="he causes pain"] saying, Because I bare him with pain.
text.KJV: 4:9 ¶ And Iabez was more honourable then his brethren: and his mother called his name Iabez, saying, Because I bare him with sorrow.
text.NABRE: 4:9 Jabez was the most distinguished of his brothers. His mother had named him Jabez, saying, “I bore him with pain.”

text.NRSV: Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, “Oh that you would bless me and enlarge my border, and that your hand might be with me, and that you would keep me from hurt and harm!” And God granted what he asked.
text.Rotherham: So then Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldst, indeed bless, me, and enlarge my boundary, and that thy hand might be with me,—and that thou wouldst work [to deliver me] from evil, that it be not my pain. And God brought about that which he asked.
text.KJV: 4:10 And Iabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest blesse mee indeede, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might bee with me, and that thou wouldest keepe mee from euill, that it may not grieue me. And God granted him that which he requested.
text.NABRE: 4:10 Jabez prayed to the God of Israel: “Oh, that you may truly bless me and extend my boundaries! May your hand be with me and make me free of misfortune, without pain!” And God granted his prayer.

text.NRSV: Chelub the brother of Shuhah became the father of Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.
text.Rotherham: And, Chelub the brother of Shuhah, begat Mehir, the same, was the father of Eshton.
text.KJV: 4:11 ¶ And Chelub the brother of Shuah, begate Mehir, which was the father of Eshton.
text.NABRE: 4:11 Chelub, the brother of Shuhah, became the father of Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.

text.NRSV: Eshton became the father of Beth-rapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.
text.Rotherham: And, Eshton, begat Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah, the father of Ir-nahash. These, are the men of Recah.
text.KJV: 4:12 And Eshton begate Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Rechah.
text.NABRE: 4:12 Eshton became the father of Bethrapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah, the father of the city of Nahash. These were the men of Recah.

text.NRSV: The sons of Kenaz: Othniel and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath and Meonothai.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Kenaz, were Othniel, and Seraiah,—and, the sons of Othniel, Hathath.
text.KJV: 4:13 And the sonnes of Kenaz: Othniel, and Saraia: and the sonnes of Othniel, Hathath.
text.NABRE: 4:13 The sons of Kenaz were Othniel and Seraiah. The sons of Othniel were Hathath and Meonothai;

text.NRSV: Meonothai became the father of Ophrah; and Seraiah became the father of Joab father of Ge-harashim, so-called because they were artisans.
text.Rotherham: And, Meonothai, begat Ophrah,—and, Seraiah, begat Joab, the father of Ge-harashim, for they were, craftsmen.
text.KJV: 4:14 And Meonothai begate Ophrah: and Seraiah begate Ioab, the father of the valley of Charasim, for they were craftesmen.
text.NABRE: 4:14 Meonothai became the father of Ophrah. Seraiah became the father of Joab, the father of Geharashim, so called because they were artisans.

text.NRSV: The sons of Caleb son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the son of Elah: Kenaz.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Caleb son of Jephunneh, were Iru, Elah, and Naam,—and the sons of Elah and Kenaz.
text.KJV: 4:15 And the sonnes of Caleb the sonne of Iephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam, and the sonnes of Elah, euen Kenaz.
text.NABRE: 4:15 The sons of Caleb, son of Jephunneh, were Ir, Elah, and Naam. The sons of Elah: Kenaz.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jehallelel, Ziph and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
text.KJV: 4:16 And the sonnes of Iehaleleel: Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.
text.NABRE: 4:16 The sons of Jehallelel were Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ezrah: Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon. These are the sons of Bithiah, daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered married; and she conceived and bore Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah father of Eshtemoa.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Ezrah, Jether and Mered, and Epher and Jalon. And, these, are the sons of Bithia, daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered took,—and she conceived and bare Miriam and Shammai, and Ishbah, the father of Eshtemoa.
text.KJV: 4:17 And the sonnes of Ezra were: Iether, and Mered, and Epher, and Ialon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, & Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
text.NABRE: 4:17 The sons of Ezrah were Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon. Jether became the father of Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah, the father of Eshtemoa.

text.NRSV: And his Judean wife bore Jered father of Gedor, Heber father of Soco, and Jekuthiel father of Zanoah.
text.Rotherham: And, his wife, the Jewess, bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel, the father of Zanoah.
text.KJV: 4:18 And his wife Iehudiiah bare Iered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Iekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these are the sonnes of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, which Mered tooke.
text.NABRE: 4:18 Mered’s Egyptian wife bore Jered, the father of Gedor, Heber, the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel, the father of Zanoah. These were the sons of Bithiah, the daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered married.

text.NRSV: The sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the fathers of Keilah the Garmite and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the father of Keilah, the Garmite,—and Eshtemoa, the Maacathite.
text.KJV: 4:19 And the sonnes of his wife Hodiah, the sister of Naham the father of Keilah, the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.
text.NABRE: 4:19 The sons of his Jewish wife, the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah, were Shimon the Garmite and Ishi the Maacathite.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shimon: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. The sons of Ishi: Zoheth and Ben-zoheth.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Shimon, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan and Tilon. And, the sons of Ishi, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
text.KJV: 4:20 And the sonnes of Simeon were: Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sonnes of Ishi were: Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
text.NABRE: 4:20 The sons of Shimon were Amnon, Rinnah, Benhanan, and Tilon. The son of Ishi was Zoheth and the son of Zoheth….

text.NRSV: The sons of Shelah son of Judah: Er father of Lecah, Laadah father of Mareshah, and the families of the guild of linen workers at Beth-ashbea;
text.Rotherham: the sons of Shelah, the son of Judah, Er, the father of Lecah, and Laadah, the father of Mareshah,—and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea;
text.KJV: 4:21 ¶ The sonnes of Shelah the sonne of Iudah were: Er the father of Lecah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linnen, of the house of Ashbea.
text.NABRE: 4:21 The sons of Shelah, son of Judah, were: Er, the father of Lecah; Laadah, the father of Mareshah; the clans of the linen weavers’ guild in Bethashbea;

text.NRSV: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who married into Moab and returned to Lehem (now the records are ancient).
text.Rotherham: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph who ruled for Moab, and Jashubi-lehem,—but, the records, are ancient.
text.KJV: 4:22 And Iokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Ioash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, & Iashubi Lehem. And these are ancient things.
text.NABRE: 4:22 Jokim; the people of Cozeba; and Joash and Saraph, who held property in Moab, but returned to Bethlehem. (These are events of old.)

text.NRSV: These were the potters and inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah; they lived there in the king’s service.
text.Rotherham: They, were the potters and the inhabitants of Netaim, and Gederah,—with the king in his work, dwelt they there.
text.KJV: 4:23 These were the Potters, and those that dwelt amongst plants and hedges. There they dwelt with the king for his worke.
text.NABRE: 4:23 They were potters and inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah, where they lived in the king’s service.

text.NRSV: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;
text.Rotherham: The sons of Simeon, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul:
text.KJV: 4:24 ¶ The sonnes of Simeon were: Nemuel, and Iamin, Iarib, Zerah, and Shaul:
text.NABRE: 4:24 Simeon. The sons of Simeon were Nemuel, Jamin, Jachin, Zerah, and Shaul,

text.NRSV: Shallum was his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
text.Rotherham: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
text.KJV: 4:25 Shallum his sonne: Mibsam his sonne: Mishma his sonne.
text.NABRE: 4:25 whose son was Shallum, whose son was Mibsam, whose son was Mishma.

text.NRSV: The sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Mishma, Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.
text.KJV: 4:26 And the sonnes of Mishma: Hamuel his sonne, Zacchur his sonne, Shimei his sonne.
text.NABRE: 4:26 The sons of Mishma were his son Hammuel, whose son was Zaccur, whose son was Shimei.

text.NRSV: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brothers did not have many children, nor did all their family multiply like the Judeans.
text.Rotherham: And, Shimei, had sixteen sons, and six daughters, but, his brethren, had not many children,—nor did, any of their family, multiply so much as the sons of Judah.
text.KJV: 4:27 And Shimei had sixteene sonnes, and sixe daughters, but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply like to the children of Iudah.
text.NABRE: 4:27 Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters. His brothers, however, did not have many sons, and as a result all their clans did not equal the number of the Judahites.

text.NRSV: They lived in Beer-sheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual,
text.Rotherham: And they dwelt in Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual;
text.KJV: 4:28 And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual,
text.NABRE: 4:28 They dwelt in Beer-sheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual,

text.NRSV: Bilhah, Ezem, Tolad,
text.Rotherham: and in Bilhah, and in Ezem, and in Tolad;
text.KJV: 4:29 And at Bilha, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,
text.NABRE: 4:29 Bilhah, Ezem, Tolad,

text.NRSV: Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag,
text.Rotherham: and in Bethuel, and in Hormah, and in Ziklag;
text.KJV: 4:30 And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,
text.NABRE: 4:30 Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag,

text.NRSV: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Beth-biri, and Shaaraim. These were their towns until David became king.
text.Rotherham: and in Beth-marcaboth, and in Hazar-susim, and in Beth-biri, and in Shaaraim. These, were their cities unto the reign of David.
text.KJV: 4:31 And at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-Susim, and at Bethbirei, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities, vnto the reigne of Dauid.
text.NABRE: 4:31 Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Bethbiri, and Shaaraim. Until the reign of David, these were their cities

text.NRSV: And their villages were Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan, five towns,
text.Rotherham: And, their villages, were Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan,—five cities;
text.KJV: 4:32 And their villages were: Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, fiue cities.
text.NABRE: 4:32 and their villages. Etam, also, and Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan—five cities,

text.NRSV: along with all their villages that were around these towns as far as Baal. These were their settlements. And they kept a genealogical record.
text.Rotherham: and all their villages that were round about these cities, as far as Baal. These, were their habitations, and they had their own genealogical register.
text.KJV: 4:33 And all their villages that were round about the same cities, vnto Baal. These were their habitations, and their genealogie:
text.NABRE: 4:33 together with all their outlying villages as far as Baal. Here is where they dwelt, and so it was inscribed of them in their family records.

text.NRSV: Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah son of Amaziah,
text.Rotherham: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah, the son of Amaziah;
text.KJV: 4:34 And Meshobab, and Iamlech, and Ioshah the sonne of Amashiah,
text.NABRE: 4:34 Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah, son of Amaziah,

text.NRSV: Joel, Jehu son of Joshibiah son of Seraiah son of Asiel,
text.Rotherham: and Joel,—and Jehu, the son of Joshibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel:
text.KJV: 4:35 And Ioel, and Iehu the sonne of Iosibia, the sonne of Seraia, the sonne of Asiel,
text.NABRE: 4:35 Joel, Jehu, son of Joshibiah, son of Seraiah, son of Asiel,

text.NRSV: Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaiah,
text.Rotherham: and Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah:
text.KJV: 4:36 And Elioenai, and Iaakobah, and Iesohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Iesimiel, and Benaiah,
text.NABRE: 4:36 Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaiah,

text.NRSV: Ziza son of Shiphi son of Allon son of Jedaiah son of Shimri son of Shemaiah—
text.Rotherham: and Ziza, son of Shiphi, son of Allon, son of Jedaiah, son of Shimri, son of Shemaiah.
text.KJV: 4:37 And Ziza the sonne of Shiphi, the sonne of Allon, the sonne of Iedaia, the sonne of Shimri, the sonne of Shemaiah.
text.NABRE: 4:37 Ziza, son of Shiphi, son of Allon, son of Jedaiah, son of Shimri, son of Shemaiah—

text.NRSV: these mentioned by name were princes in their families, and their ancestral houses increased greatly.
text.Rotherham: These, introduced by their names, were leading men in their families. And, their ancestral house, brake forth exceedingly;
text.KJV: 4:38 These mentioned by their names, were Princes in their families, and the house of their fathers increased greatly.
text.NABRE: 4:38 these just named were princes in their clans, and their ancestral houses spread out to such an extent

text.NRSV: They journeyed to the entrance of Gedor, to the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks,
text.Rotherham: so they went to the entering in of Gerar, unto the east of the valley,—to seek pasture for their flocks;
text.KJV: 4:39 ¶ And they went to the entrance of Gedor, euen vnto the East side of the valley, to seeke pasture for their flocks.
text.NABRE: 4:39 that they went to the approaches of Gedor, east of the valley, seeking pasture for their flocks.

text.NRSV: where they found rich, good pasture, and the land was very broad, quiet, and peaceful; for the former inhabitants there belonged to Ham.
text.Rotherham: and they found pasture, fat and good, and, the land, was broad on both hands, and quiet, and secure,—for, of Ham, were the dwellers there aforetime.
text.KJV: 4:40 And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable: for they of Ham had dwelt there of old.
text.NABRE: 4:40 They found abundant and good pastures, and the land was spacious, quiet, and peaceful—for the Hamites dwelt there formerly.

text.NRSV: These, registered by name, came in the days of King Hezekiah of Judah, and attacked their tents and the Meunites who were found there, and exterminated them to this day, and settled in their place, because there was pasture there for their flocks.
text.Rotherham: But these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the Meunim who were found there, and devoted them, until this day, and dwelt in their stead,—for there was pasture for their flocks, there.
text.KJV: 4:41 And these written by name, came in the dayes of Hezekiah king of Iudah, and smote their tents, and the habitations that were found there, and destroyed them vtterly vnto this day, and dwelt in their roomes: because there was pasture there for their flocks.
text.NABRE: 4:41 They who have just been listed by name set out during the reign of Hezekiah, king of Judah, and attacked their tents and also the Meunites who were there. They put them under the ban that is still in force to this day and dwelt in their place because they found pasture there for their flocks.

text.NRSV: And some of them, five hundred men of the Simeonites, went to Mount Seir, having as their leaders Pelatiah, Neariah, Rephaiah, and Uzziel, sons of Ishi;
text.Rotherham: And, some of them, of the sons of Simeon, went to Mount Seir, five hundred men,—with Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, sons of Ishi, at their head;
text.KJV: 4:42 And some of them, euen of the sonnes of Simeon, fiue hundred men, went to mount Seir, hauing for their captaines Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sonnes of Ishi.
text.NABRE: 4:42 Five hundred of them (the Simeonites) went to Mount Seir, with Pelatiah, Neariah, Rephaiah, and Uzziel, sons of Ishi, at their head.

text.NRSV: they destroyed the remnant of the Amalekites that had escaped, and they have lived there to this day.
text.Rotherham: and they smote the remainder that had escaped, of the Amalekites,—and dwelt there—[as they have] unto this day.
text.KJV: 4:43 And they smote the rest of the Amalekites that were escaped, and dwelt there vnto this day.
text.NABRE: 4:43 They attacked the surviving Amalekites who had escaped, and have lived there to the present day.

text.NRSV: The sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel. (He was the firstborn, but because he defiled his father’s bed his birthright was given to the sons of Joseph son of Israel, so that he is not enrolled in the genealogy according to the birthright;
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel, for, he, was the firstborn, but because he defiled the couch of his father, his birthright was given to the sons of Joseph son of Israel,—and he is not to be enrolled in the place of firstborn,
text.KJV: 5:1 Now the sonnes of Reuben the first borne of Israel, (for hee was the first borne, but, forasmuch as he defiled his fathers bed, his birthright was giuen vnto the sonnes of Ioseph the sonne of Israel: and the genealogie is not to be reckoned after the birthright.
text.NABRE: 5:1 Chapter 5 Reuben. The sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel. (He was indeed the firstborn, but because he defiled the couch of his father his birthright was given to the sons of Joseph, son of Israel, so that he is not listed in the family records according to his birthright.

text.NRSV: though Judah became prominent among his brothers and a ruler came from him, yet the birthright belonged to Joseph.)
text.Rotherham: for, Judah, prevailed over his brethren, so that, even the prince, is from him,—although, the birthright, pertaineth to Joseph;
text.KJV: 5:2 For Iudah preuailed aboue his brethren, and of him came the chiefe rulers, but the birthright was Iosephs.
text.NABRE: 5:2 Judah, in fact, became powerful among his brothers, so that the ruler came from him, though the birthright had been Joseph’s.)

text.NRSV: The sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel, Hanoch and Pallu, Hezron and Carmi.
text.KJV: 5:3 The sonnes, I say, of Reuben the first borne of Israel were: Hanoch, and Pallu, Ezron, and Carmi.
text.NABRE: 5:3 The sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel, were Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

text.NRSV: The sons of Joel: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son,
text.Rotherham: The sons of Joel, Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son;
text.KJV: 5:4 The sonnes of Ioel: Shemaiah his sonne: Gog his sonne: Shimei his sonne:
text.NABRE: 5:4 His son was Joel, whose son was Shemaiah, whose son was Gog, whose son was Shimei,

text.NRSV: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son,
text.Rotherham: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son;
text.KJV: 5:5 Micah his son: Reaia his sonne: Baal his sonne.
text.NABRE: 5:5 whose son was Micah, whose son was Reaiah, whose son was Baal,

text.NRSV: Beerah his son, whom King Tilgath-pilneser of Assyria carried away into exile; he was a pioneer of the Reubenites.
text.Rotherham: Beerah his son, whom Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria carried away captive,—he, was a leader to the Reubenites;
text.KJV: 5:6 Beerah his sonne: whom Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria, carried away captiue: He was Prince of the Reubenites.
text.NABRE: 5:6 whose son was Beerah, whom Tilgath-pileser, the king of Assyria, took into exile; he was a prince of the Reubenites.

text.NRSV: And his kindred by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned: the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,
text.Rotherham: and his brethren, by his families, in the genealogical registering, by their generations,—the chief Jeiel, and Zechariah;
text.KJV: 5:7 And his brethren by their families (when the genealogie of their generations was reckoned) were the chiefe, Ieiel, and Zechariah,
text.NABRE: 5:7 His brothers who belonged to his clans, when they were listed in the family records according to their descendants, were: Jeiel, the chief, and Zechariah,

text.NRSV: and Bela son of Azaz, son of Shema, son of Joel, who lived in Aroer, as far as Nebo and Baal-meon.
text.Rotherham: and Bela, the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel,—he, dwelt in Aroer, even as far as Nebo, and Baal-meon;
text.KJV: 5:8 And Bela the sonne of Azah, the sonne of Shema, the sonne of Ioel, who dwelt in Aroer, euen vnto Nebo, and Baalmeon.
text.NABRE: 5:8 and Bela, son of Azaz, son of Shema, son of Joel. The Reubenites lived in Aroer and as far as Nebo and Baal-meon;

text.NRSV: He also lived to the east as far as the beginning of the desert this side of the Euphrates, because their cattle had multiplied in the land of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: and, eastward, dwelt he as far as the entering in of the desert, from the river Euphrates,—because, their cattle, were multiplied in the land of Gilead;
text.KJV: 5:9 And Eastward he inhabited vnto the entring in of the wildernes, from the riuer Euphrates: because their cattell were multiplied in the land of Gilead.
text.NABRE: 5:9 toward the east they dwelt as far as the wilderness which extends from the Euphrates River, for they had much livestock in the land of Gilead.

text.NRSV: And in the days of Saul they made war on the Hagrites, who fell by their hand; and they lived in their tents throughout all the region east of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: and, in the days of Saul, they made war with the Hagrites, who fell by their hand,—so they dwelt in their tents, over all the face of the land east of Gilead.
text.KJV: 5:10 And in the dayes of Saul, they made warre with the Hagarites, who fell by their hand: and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the East land of Gilead.
text.NABRE: 5:10 In Saul’s time they waged war with the Hagrites, and when they had defeated them they dwelt in their tents throughout the region east of Gilead.

text.NRSV: The sons of Gad lived beside them in the land of Bashan as far as Salecah:
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Gad, over against them, dwelt, in the land of Bashan, as far as Salecah:
text.KJV: 5:11 ¶ And the children of Gad dwelt ouer against them, in the land of Bashan vnto Salchah.
text.NABRE: 5:11 Gad. The Gadites lived alongside them in the land of Bashan as far as Salecah.

text.NRSV: Joel the chief, Shapham the second, Janai, and Shaphat in Bashan.
text.Rotherham: Joel the chief, and Shapham, the second,—and Janai and Shaphat, in Bashan;
text.KJV: 5:12 Ioel the chiefe, and Shapham the next: and Iaanai, and Shaphat in Bashan.
text.NABRE: 5:12 Joel was chief, Shapham was second in command, and Janai was judge in Bashan.

text.NRSV: And their kindred according to their ancestral houses: Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jacan, Zia, and Eber, seven.
text.Rotherham: and their brethren of their ancestral house, Michael and Meshullam and Sheba and Jorai and Jacan and Zia and Eber, seven.
text.KJV: 5:13 And their brethren of the house of their fathers, were: Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Iorai, and Iachan, and Zia, and Heber, seuen.
text.NABRE: 5:13 Their brothers, according to their ancestral houses, were: Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jacan, Zia, and Eber—seven.

text.NRSV: These were the sons of Abihail son of Huri, son of Jaroah, son of Gilead, son of Michael, son of Jeshishai, son of Jahdo, son of Buz;
text.Rotherham: These, were the sons of Abihail, son of Huri, son of Jaroah, son of Gilead, son of Michael, son of Jehishai, son of Jahdo, son of Buz,
text.KJV: 5:14 These are the children of Abihail the sonne of Huri, the sonne of Iaroah, the sonne of Gilead, the sonne of Michael, the sonne of Ieshishai, the sonne of Iahdo, the sonne of Buz:
text.NABRE: 5:14 These were the sons of Abihail, son of Huri, son of Jaroah, son of Gilead, son of Michael, son of Jeshishai, son of Jahdo, son of Buz.

text.NRSV: Ahi son of Abdiel, son of Guni, was chief in their ancestral houses;
text.Rotherham: Ahi son of Abdiel, son of Guni, chief of their ancestral house;
text.KJV: 5:15 Ahi the sonne of Abdiel, the sonne of Guni, chiefe of the house of their fathers.
text.NABRE: 5:15 Ahi, son of Abdiel, son of Guni, was the head of their ancestral houses.

text.NRSV: and they lived in Gilead, in Bashan and its towns, and in all the pasture lands of Sharon to their limits.
text.Rotherham: and they dwelt in Gilead—in Bashan, and in her villages,—and in all the pasture-lands of Sharon, up to their outgoings.
text.KJV: 5:16 And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in her townes, and in all the Suburbs of Sharon, vpon their borders.
text.NABRE: 5:16 They dwelt in Gilead, in Bashan and its towns, and in all the pasture lands of Sirion to the borders.

text.NRSV: All of these were enrolled by genealogies in the days of King Jotham of Judah, and in the days of King Jeroboam of Israel.
